title: Health Information Technician
description: Takeda is seeking a Health Information Technician to manage patient health records and ensure data integrity across our clinical operations. You'll organize, maintain, and secure health information systems while supporting HIPAA compliance. Work hybrid in St. Louis for a global biopharmaceutical company committed to developing innovative medicines.
responsibilities: Manage patient health records and maintain data accuracy and completeness
Organize and file health information using electronic and paper systems
Verify insurance information and process authorization requests
Ensure compliance with HIPAA regulations and privacy standards
Respond to records requests from authorized healthcare providers

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; HIT certification preferred
skills: Medical terminology and health record systems
Attention to detail and organizational skills
